title: Create and Conquer: the Sildaris Wilds
description: This is the official modpack for the server Create and Conquer: the Sildaris Wilds
body:
MAKE SURE YOU INSTALL THE RIGHT MODPACK FOR YOU!
GO TO THE VERSIONS TAB

The full modpack contains shaders, distant horizons, etc. The lite pack contains the bare neceseties and is for low end devices.

This modpack is the client modpack for the server Create and Conquer: the Sildaris Wilds, a steam-fantasy themed nation building server. This modpack can of course be used in a standalone singleplayer environment, but is is optimised for the multiplayer nation building experience so may not be the best experience solo. The pack allows for exciting and advanced warfare, with technologies such as cannons from Create Big Cannons, or muskets from ewewukek's musket mod. There is also many side activities to do other than warfare, such as cooking, exploring, astronomy, and so much more.

The modpack has just been updated to contain lore technological advancements with train travel and combustion engines.

Trailer: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=STL6prqEY6M&t=6s](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=STL6prqEY6M&t=6s)

If you have not ventured to the Sildaris wilds yet, come on and join us on our [official discord](https://discord.gg/NMMg4TJ6Cf)!

The mod Create D+ is developed by the Create and Conquer team. [https://modrinth.com/mod/create-d+](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-d+)

ATTRIBUTIONS:

Immersive aircraft by Luke 10000 [https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft)

Airship textures by nicky21: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack)

Warship texture by crazyfl_: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircraft-warship](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircraft-warship)

Better FPS distance by someaddon: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-fps-render-distance](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-fps-render-distance)

Better chunk loading by someaddon: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-chunk-loading-forge-fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-chunk-loading-forge-fabric)

Cupboard API by someaddon: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard) 

Musket Mod by ewewukeks: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ewewukeks-musket-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ewewukeks-musket-mod)
